---
title: "RSVP"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles_RSVP.css
---


<div class="secondary-btn-wrapper">
  <a href="/RSVP/RSVP.html" class="secondary-btn secondary-btn--active">RSVP · AN/ ABMELDUNG</a>
</div>
<div class="secondary-btn-wrapper">
  <a href="/index.html" class="secondary-btn">HOME</a>
  <a href="/info/info.html" class="secondary-btn">INFO</a>
</div>


::: small-space
:::

**Staturday, 29th August 2026**\
Main Event @Chäsalp, Zürich.\
4pm onwards.

**Friday, 28th August 2026**\
Welcome Drinks [@Grain Pub](https://www.grain.ch/), Zürich.\
6pm onwards.

::: small-space
:::


Please RSVP (An/ Abmelden) below 👇 latest by **July 1st, 2026**, even if you are unable to attend.\
Please register individually, even if you’re invited as a couple or group, so we have all info we need.

<!-- <div class="typeform-wrapper"> -->
<!--   <div data-tf-live="01KHJV0AXM3YSVHR8ZJMQXNPD7"></div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
<!-- <script src="//embed.typeform.com/next/embed.js"></script> -->

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc7ulLY6SbbJlbz-iV6iMAk6Ybs4jeXxbkx_J-2UDsJ1-SEqQ/viewform?embedded=true" width="640" height="1561" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>
